subject: An armored human knight in mid-flight astride a white griffin or pegasus-like winged mount, wielding a sword as it banks through bright sky above red-roofed city rooftops
description: A human knight in dark plate and a long red cape rides a white-feathered winged mount through a sunlit sky. The mount's wings are spread wide, mid-beat, with feathers catching the light. The rider leans forward, sword drawn and angled outward, helmet streaming a small banner or crest. Below, terracotta-tiled rooftops of a dense city stretch into a hazy distance, locating the action above the urban skyline of Ravnica. The palette is warm — gold, red, and white-feather highlights set against a pale blue sky and rust-colored roofs.
foreground: winged white mount with armored knight rider holding a sword, red cape trailing
background: sunlit sky over red-tiled urban rooftops fading into haze
emotion: determined, mid-charge focus, leaning into the dive
